questions.question: Inside which HTML element do we put the JavaScript?
questions.explanation: The <script> tag is used to embed a client-side script (JavaScript).

questions.question: How do you write 'Hello World' in an alert box?
questions.explanation: The alert() method displays an alert box with a specified message.
